description: Critical poly_bot rebalance planner, executor, blocked, or stuck health signals from the production runtime.
filter: (resource.type="gce_instance" OR (resource.type="k8s_container" AND resource.labels.cluster_name="arb-bot" AND resource.labels.namespace_name="arb-bot" AND resource.labels.container_name="arb-bot")) AND (jsonPayload.fields.message="rebalance executor failed closed" OR jsonPayload.fields.message="rebalance planning failed closed" OR (jsonPayload.fields.message="rebalance health heartbeat" AND jsonPayload.fields.healthy=false) OR textPayload:"rebalance executor failed closed" OR textPayload:"rebalance planning failed closed" OR textPayload:"healthy=false")
